zh.lifeSummary: Tabitha於大約1618年出生在英國。她於1640年與John Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年4月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年73歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Tabitha于大约1618年出生在英国。她于1640年与John Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年4月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年73岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文。

nameMeanings.name: Tabitha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Aramaic name, meaning ‘doe’ or ‘roe’, borne in the New Testament by a woman who was restored to life by St Peter (Acts 9:36–41). In the biblical account this form of the name is given together with its Greek equivalent,   Dorcas .  It was one of the names much favoured by Puritans and Dissenters from the 16th to the 19th centuries.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Tabitha was born about 1618, in England. She married John Thomas in 1640, in British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 April 1690, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Tabitha est née environ 1618, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Thomas en 1640, à Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 avril 1690, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Tabithaは約1618年にイギリスで生まれた。1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカでJohn Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1690年4月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニュー ヘイベンにて埋葬された。

ko.New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운
ko.New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Unite: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐
ko.New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐
ko.lifeSummary: Tabitha(은)는 대략 1618년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아에서 John Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 4월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Tabitha nasceu aproximadamente 1618, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Thomas em 1640, em British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de abril de 1690, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em New Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Tabitha родилась около 1618 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas в 1640 г. в местности бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 апреля 1690 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности ню хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Tabitha nació aproximadamente 1618, en Inglaterra. Se casó con John Thomas en 1640, en British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1690, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
